name: Bayerische Motoren Werke AG
lede: BMW runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Chennai and Gurugram, covering CoE and manufacturing, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one BMW office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: BMW GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: BMW runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Chennai, Gurugram), covering CoE and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: BMW's India footprint covers Chennai and Gurugram, spanning CoE and manufacturing. The centers deliver IT, HR, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fourteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does BMW operate in India?
faq.a: BMW operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does BMW have GCC centers in?
faq.a: BMW's India GCC footprint spans Chennai and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does BMW run in India?
faq.a: BMW runs CoE and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at BMW's India GCCs?
faq.a: BMW's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads BMW's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 14 leaders at BMW's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
